subject: more hpl money sent to enron

emails.subject: FW: More HPL money sent to ENRON
emails.subject_base: More HPL money sent to ENRON
emails.body: FW: More HPL money sent to ENRON This should go for insturctions on the El Paso check too. It could go directly to AEP as well. Troy is preparing a payment request and Lisa Koerselma should be in charge of doing the wire transfer request. To: Zisman, Stuart; Coffey Jr., Jim; Redmond, Brian

emails.subject: RE: More HPL money sent to ENRON
emails.subject_base: More HPL money sent to ENRON
emails.body: Jim, do you think we want to be in the middle here, it might be cleaner to send the money back to el paso To: Parks, Joe

emails.subject: RE: More HPL money sent to ENRON
emails.subject_base: More HPL money sent to ENRON
emails.body: It doesn't matter to me. I was just thinking that if we could lump the payment and wire request with the Exxon request it might save us the trouble of preparing two requests. But you also have a good point about being in the middle. What would El Paso rather us do? To: Coffey Jr., Jim
